raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A general section review centrally includes assessing whether the contribution framing and thesis are clear and appropriate.","R1.2":"The request entails checking whether the section's argumentative progression from method to results to conclusion is coherent.","R1.3":"Because the section makes empirical claims from reported ECE and accuracy results, review includes checking whether those claims are supported as stated.","R1.4":"The section explicitly claims novelty relative to prior RLHF and calibration work, making novelty assessment central.","R1.5":"Reviewing a section includes evaluating whether the ordering and narrative arc of its paragraphs work at the section level.","R1.6":"A section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, register, and flow.","R1.7":"The artifact cites prior work and makes literature-coverage claims, so citation and scholarship responsibilities are active.","RX.1":"Any review must disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks enough information to verify a judgment.","RX.2":"The review must avoid endorsing or strengthening claims beyond what the section supports.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing edits or adding unrelated tasks.","RX.4":"The review must consider possible downstream harm from unsupported high-stakes deployment or calibration claims.","RX.5":"The review should ground judgments in traceable features of the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: A general section review centrally includes assessing whether the contribution framing and thesis are clear and appropriate.
rationale.R1.2: The request entails checking whether the section's argumentative progression from method to results to conclusion is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: Because the section makes empirical claims from reported ECE and accuracy results, review includes checking whether those claims are supported as stated.
rationale.R1.4: The section explicitly claims novelty relative to prior RLHF and calibration work, making novelty assessment central.
rationale.R1.5: Reviewing a section includes evaluating whether the ordering and narrative arc of its paragraphs work at the section level.
rationale.R1.6: A section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, register, and flow.
rationale.R1.7: The artifact cites prior work and makes literature-coverage claims, so citation and scholarship responsibilities are active.
rationale.RX.1: Any review must disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks enough information to verify a judgment.
rationale.RX.2: The review must avoid endorsing or strengthening claims beyond what the section supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing edits or adding unrelated tasks.
rationale.RX.4: The review must consider possible downstream harm from unsupported high-stakes deployment or calibration claims.
rationale.RX.5: The review should ground judgments in traceable features of the provided artifact.
